_notes: Synthesized off Step-2 spike (data/fixtures/oisst/point-sample.json::california_coast_sample). Input: lat=35.0, lon=-120.5 (off California). lon_erddap = 239.5. Snapped grid centre returned by ERDDAP: lat=35.125, lon_erddap=239.625 -> converts to snappedLon=-120.375. Sample sst value taken from a realistic mid-April Pacific surface temperature (14.36 C range shifted to 16.42 C for distinguishability across fixtures).
